description: The project is an interior renovation to a 3 story historic building on the Xavier University Campus with a type (b) business occupancy. It has a reinforced concrete primary structure, masonry exterior walls, and wood framing for pitch roofs. Intended work to be performed is an upgrade to the buildings mechanical systems with modifications to select ceilings within interior spaces, as well as the installation of a new fire sprinkler system. This project is related to a previously filed exterior renovation permit listed in the application.
Partial demolition and rear addition with commercial kitchen to an existing commercial building.

The scope of work for this project is to demo (partial), addition and renovate of the currently used one-story conventional framed pier foundation used by adjacent church, First Zion Worship Center as a multi-functional facility. Plumbing, Mechanical and Electrical will be done by license sub-contractor.

NEW CONSTRUCTION OF A 1STRY, 2,822 SQFT OFFICE BUILDING FOR THE TULANE UNIVERSITY POLICE DEPARTMENT, SITE WORK TO INCLUDE NEW RAMPS, PARKING SURFACES, WALKWAYS, AND LANDSCAPING. ALL WORK TO BE DONE AS PER PLANS. Temporary Occupancy Issued on 8-10-23 for 90 Days to get DPW Inspecitons Completed.

description: Follow-up work previously performed under permit number #19-12445-HDLC. See attached drawings indicating the proposed exterior renovation scope of work including the following. Repair/Replace existing windows to match size, shape, and profile. Repair/Replace doors to match size and shape. Any new doors and windows will be submitted for HDLC review. Install front wrap-around awing to match historic as well as a small addition to the rear of the existing structure (approx. 5'-8" x 26'-8"). NO USE OR OCCUPANCY UNDER THIS PERMIT, EXTERIOR WORK ONLY. Fence limited to 7' in height. Extend 180 days to June 20, 2024. Permit extended (1) 180 days periods until December 26, 2024 Permit extended (2) 180 day periods until December 26, 2025 Permit extended (2) 180 day periods to January 1, 2027 Carimi Construction and Development LLC is the contractor as of January 6, 2026
